```{r, setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = F)
getwd()
library(png)
library(grid)
# library(quanteda.textmodels)
# library(gridExtra)
```

```{r}
getwd()
setwd('../Herbicide')
getwd()
```


```{r}

a <- readPNG("hist_Clethodim.png")
str(a)
b <- readPNG("C:\\Users\\ALEX\\Desktop\\test1\\Herbicide\\img\\Farmer A\\hist_Glyphosate.png")
c <- readPNG("C:\\Users\\ALEX\\Desktop\\test1\\Herbicide\\img\\Farmer A\\hist_Sulfometuron.png")
d <- readPNG("C:\\Users\\ALEX\\Desktop\\test1\\Herbicide\\img\\Farmer A\\hist_Terbuthylazine.png")

plot.new()
grid.raster(a, x = unit(0.5, "npc"), y = unit(0.5, "npc"))
grid.raster(b, x = unit(0.8, "npc"), y = unit(0.8, "npc"))

```

```{r}
# listaa = c("C:\\Users\\ALEX\\Desktop\\test1\\Herbicide\\img\\Farmer A\\hist_Clethodim.png", "C:\\Users\\ALEX\\Desktop\\test1\\Herbicide\\img\\Farmer A\\hist_Glyphosate.png", "C:\\Users\\ALEX\\Desktop\\test1\\Herbicide\\img\\Farmer A\\hist_Sulfometuron.png", "C:\\Users\\ALEX\\Desktop\\test1\\Herbicide\\img\\Farmer A\\hist_Terbuthylazine.png")
# knitr::include_graphics(listaa)
```

```{r}
test1 <- c("England and France are members of NATO and UNESCO", "bSNAKJDd")
c = tolower(test1)
print(c)

d <- paste0(toupper(substring(c, 1,1)), substring(c, 2))
print(d)


```

```{r}
df_sample_size = read.delim("C:\\Users\\ALEX\\Desktop\\test1\\Herbicide\\data\\SAMPLE_SIZES.txt", header=TRUE, na.strings=c("#N/A", "-"))
# print(df_sample_size$herbicide)
# print(df_sample_size$HERBICIDE)
# there is difference of capitalization in data frame
str(df_sample_size)
df =  df_sample_size[df_sample_size$POP==c("ACC03", "ACC04"), ] # max of 2 condition in a vector can be evaluated
str(df)
```
```{r}
df<-data.frame("hi","bye")
names(df)<-c("hello","goodbye")

de<-data.frame("hola","ciao")
names(de)<-c("hello","goodbye")

newdf <- rbind(df, de)
str(newdf)
```
